results.title: Virginia basketball to square off with Duke twice in 2026-27 as ACC announces league opponents
results.description: Virginia basketball will play against Duke twice during the 2026-27 campaign, the ACC announced on Thursday when it revealed league opponents for the coming season.

results.title: Slazek qualifies for Div. 2 state golf finals
results.description: South Haven's Blake Slazek qualified for the Division 2 state finals Wednesday, shooting a 76 and finishing as co-medalist in a Division 2 regional at Clearbrook Country Club in Saugatuck.

results.title: Champions League final pundit pulls out at last minute as ex-Arsenal star fears abuse
results.description: A former Arsenal midfielder has pulled out of his punditry duties for the Champions League final.

results.title: How refreshing it is to hear new Canucks regime embrace a proper rebuild
results.description: Mike Halford and Jason Brough discuss the Canucks finally embracing the idea of a proper rebuild, and how refreshing it is to hear Henrik Sedin say they were tired of missing the playoffs each year while trying to win.

results.title: All SEC performer Billy Richmond III withdrawing from NBA Draft for return to Arkansas for his junior season in 2026-27
results.description: By Kevin McPherson LITTLE ROCK -- Razorbacks wing and all-league performer Billy Richmond III intends to return to Arkansas for his junior season in 2026-27 while withdrawing from the 2026 NBA Draft after conflicting reports about his decision emerged on Wednesday. He became Head Hog John Calipari's first and only retention recruiting win from the team's top [...]
